title: Tom's Biome Mobs
description: Biome specific textures for almost all Mobs
body:
[Keep this project alive](https://ko-fi.com/lardtom) --- ![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ccb7bbb5cbd0967cb7aeb0826470b6c45c0e922.png) Tom's Biome Mobs is a resourcepack that is currently in development. Itgives biome specific textures to almost every mob in the game. The goal is to intigrate the mobs more in the enviorement. --- ![requirements](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3c3053d817f98e8574c36076cee424b1a57f1190.png) This resource pack relies on the Custom Entity Models (CEM) feature available in OptiFine to include new models and animations. **It will not function correctly without this feature!** Alternatively, you can use the combination of Entity Model Features and Entity Texture Features as a substitute for CEM functionality. [Optifine Download](https://optifine.net/downloads]) [EMF Download](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) [ETF Download](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) ---
Affected Mobs
- Cow
- Chicken
- Creeper
- Iron Golem
- Llama
- Pig
- Skeleton
- Slime
- Spider
- Turtle
- Wandering Trader
- Witch
- Zombie
--- As seen on OMGcrafts channel --- Works with the [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) pack just make sure that Tom's Biome Mobs is listed above Fresh Animations ---
Terms & Conditions
By using this resource pack, you agree to the following terms and conditions: 1. **Ownership & Rights** - LardTom is the creator and copyright owner of this resource pack. - These terms may be updated or changed at any time. 1. **Scope of Applicability** - These terms only apply if you plan to use this resource pack in content that you intend to share publicly. - The official project pages on CurseForge, Modrinth, or Planet Minecraft hold the authoritative version of these terms. These supersede any license, readme, or terms/conditions included elsewhere, including within the resource pack files. 2. **Specific Asset Terms** - The following terms specifically apply to: - Custom Entity Textures - Custom Entity Models - Custom Entity Model Animations - Pack Icon - Credit is required if you use these assets in your own resource pack. Ideally, include the name of this resource pack and a link to its official Modrinth page - The creator retains the final authority over how these terms are interpreted and applied to your use of the resource pack or its assets. 4. **Permitted Uses (YOU MAY):** - Modify the resource pack for personal use only (no public sharing). - Include this resource pack in your mod pack or server. - Use this resource pack in public content such as videos, live streams, or blog posts. - Use edited versions of this resource pack in your content (e.g., videos, streams, blog posts), as long as the edited version is not made publicly available. - Remix, transform, or build upon its assets in your own resource pack, provided you give proper credit. - Monetize remixed, transformed, or built-upon assets in your own resource pack. 1. **Prohibited Uses (YOU MAY NOT):** - Redistribute this resource pack as-is. - Port this resource pack or its assets to Minecraft Bedrock Edition. - Include unedited assets from this resource pack in your own resource pack without explicit permission from the creator. - Use any assets from this resource pack in a paid product or one with paid access, unless you have explicit permission from the creator.
